sections.purpose: Lead with the primary value proposition, full-banner hero image, and immediate CTA.
sections.notes: Must remain first and retain above-the-fold conversion focus.

sections.purpose: Provide a compact orange trust strip directly after the hero.
sections.notes: Acts as a fast-scanning proof band on desktop and mobile.

sections.purpose: Show the six service cards with photography and round icon badges.
sections.notes: Primary browsing section and the most image-dense content block after the hero.

sections.purpose: Reinforce company identity and local coverage with logo support and concise copy.
sections.notes: Acts as the company introduction in the current page.

sections.purpose: Show supported equipment brands as a dedicated dark logo wall.
sections.notes: Provides compatibility proof before the conversion push.

sections.purpose: Deliver a strong orange call-to-action after proof sections.
sections.notes: Single primary CTA should stay prominent.

sections.purpose: Provide direct phone, email, address, and license information.
sections.notes: Combines contact actions and licensing proof in the same section.

sections.purpose: Close with navigation, payments, social link, and legal footer text.
sections.notes: Matches the dark footer weight of the reference.
